meta.title: Asha — A complete business oasis
meta.description: Asha — an integrated office development by Rawajeh Group in Hittin, northern Riyadh.

lead.textA: is a complete office development by
lead.textB: , located on Imam Saud bin Faisal Road in the Hittin district of northern Riyadh.
lead.dim: It combines premium office villas with flexible workspaces in a contemporary architectural language — built for companies and professionals who value quality, privacy and operational efficiency.

about.cardBody: Modern architecture shaped around open air and calm circulation, organising the flow of teams and visitors seamlessly — from arrival, to parking, to the office villa.

features.leadDim: Surrounded by green courtyards, restaurants and cafés, lounge zones, and abundant parking beyond a thousand spaces.

items.lab: Standalone office villas built for companies that value privacy and a distinct corporate identity.
Office suites with flexible footprints to serve different sectors.
Total leasable area, efficiently distributed to maximise the value of every square metre.
Quiet facades, clean lines, and a visual rhythm in tune with daily work.
Green spaces and walking paths give employees a visual and mental breath of air.
Multiple styles of restaurants and cafés serving meetings and breaks.
Lounges and quiet rooms for quick meetings and flexible work.
+1,000 car parks make sure staff and guests arrive effortlessly — in a naturally busy area.
On Imam Saud bin Faisal Road, with twin fast access points to Riyadh's main arteries and the diplomatic & commercial zones.
Secure access around the clock with managed entry points and site-wide security.

location.lead: Asha is on Imam Saud bin Faisal Road in the Hittin district of northern Riyadh,
location.leadDim: with a deliberate proximity to the city's main arteries and premium residential areas.

rows.label: Hittin, north Riyadh
rows.sub: Imam Saud bin Faisal Road — twin access.

rows.label: King Khalid International Airport
rows.sub: Direct access for executives and guests.

rows.label: Diplomatic Quarter
rows.sub: Close to embassies and major institutions.

mapPin.sub: Imam Saud bin Faisal Road · Hittin

booking.lead: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within the next business day to schedule an on-site or virtual tour and walk you through the available spaces.
booking.formSub: Our project team will reach out to coordinate.
booking.fine: By submitting you agree to our privacy policy and to us keeping your details for follow-up.
booking.thanks: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.

contact.lead: Whether you're looking for an office villa for your company or a flexible suite for your team,
contact.leadDim: the Asha team is available to answer your questions and arrange the right visit for you.

quote.label: — RAWAJEH GROUP
quote.textB: — where quality, privacy and operational efficiency move to a single rhythm.

footer.copy: © 2026 Asha — a Rawajeh Group development. All rights reserved.
footer.mono: ASHA · A BUSINESS OASIS IN HITTIN, RIYADH
